message:
feat(test): add inventory type serde roundtrip and correlator.inventory() proptests

Cover InstalledAgentInventoryEntry, RunningAgentInventoryEntry, and
AgentInventory with property-based serde roundtrip tests, plus
AgentCorrelator::inventory() integration properties. 37 → 53 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
